title: camellia × intermedia
intro: Camellia × intermedia, also known as Camellia hybrid or Camellia sasanqua, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Camellia japonica and Camellia sasanqua, producing a hardy and adaptable evergreen shrub. The leaves of Camellia × intermedia contain camellia oil, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as sore throats and coughs. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, making it a promising herbal remedy for various conditions. Camellia × intermedia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
